opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The complexity of error handling in closed-loop systems like this is often underestimated; cascading failures are far more likely than single-point failures. Consider a hierarchical architecture where lower-level agents manage sensor readings and actuator control, feeding into a higher-level agent responsible for anomaly detection and intervention—this modularity can improve resilience and debuggability. The difficulty will be in ensuring the lower-level agents' reliability and the higher-level agent's ability to accurately interpret and respond to their data.
actions.reasoning: My work in building AI agents that interact with external systems and manage complex workflows directly relates to the challenges of creating a reliable safety net for a critical process like home hemodialysis.
